element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Core locomotion mechanic; described as fast-paced, can cause players to overshoot power-ups and jumps
Temporarily immobilizes enemies; primary ranged offense
Kills or hurts all on-screen enemies; powerful crowd control tool
Bubble spray ability exclusive to underwater sections
Final antagonist; described as frustratingly difficult by reviewers
Easily missed due to fast skateboard speed; placement creates challenge

typical_relief_triggers: Defeating enemy waves with roar attack
typical_tension_triggers: Fast skateboard movement creating precision platforming demands
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Fast-paced skateboarding momentum creates constant tension between maintaining speed and precision navigation; speed-related difficulty increases tension throughout

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden level select accessible via Controller 2 input sequence (Right, A, Down, Right, Y, X at title)

difficulty_curve.early_game: Accessible to younger players; straightforward platforming with skateboard mechanics introduced immediately
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increases through enemy variety (dinosaurs, sea creatures) and underwater sections requiring bubble spray mastery
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounters and sustained platforming sequences; reviewers noted frustratingly difficult boss design
notable_spikes: Underwater sections - restrict movement and change momentum physics
Fast skateboard speed creating precision jump failures

notable_level_patterns.description: Primary platforming sections featuring dinosaur enemies and skateboarding mechanics
Sections with aquatic enemies (sea creatures) and specialized bubble spray mechanic replacing fire breath
Culminating encounters against Sethron (SNES) or Skriitch (Genesis/Sega CD) with noted difficulty spikes
Reviewer criticism indicates level design relies on basic horizontal progression without complex spatial puzzle-solving

sources_used: Wikipedia: Radical Rex - Gameplay section (dinosaurs, abilities, gameplay mechanics)
Wikipedia: Radical Rex - Reception section (reviewer commentary on difficulty, pacing, level design)
The Cutting Room Floor: Radical Rex (SNES) - Level select information
